question: Based on the GDP map, which statement best describes the relationship between the states shown?

options.A: Oregon and Rhode Island have similar GDP levels.
options.B: All states on the map have very diverse GDP levels.
options.C: The GDP differences are impossible to determine from this visualization.
options.D: The GDP gap between Oregon and Rhode Island might exceed that between Kansas and Florida.

explanation: Oregon (380.5$B) and Rhode Island (450.2$B) have a 69.7$B GDP difference, while Kansas (299.7$B) and Florida (306.3$B) have only a 6.6$B difference. However, the categorical color encoding groups Oregon and Rhode Island into the same color bin (300$B+ range), making their large difference appear similar, while Kansas and Florida appear more different due to different color bins.
